markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive on Blaxel's product and publishing workflow for content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Blaxel is a "perpetual sandbox platform"** for AI agents, offering secure, high-performance MicroVMs that resume from standby in 25ms.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [**The platform has two products:** Sandboxes (the core offering) and Agent Hosting. Hosting agents on Blaxel eliminates network latency to sandboxes, enabling optimal end-to-end performance.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
  - [**Primary use cases** include coding agents (e.g., Webflow's AppChain), PR review agents, and data analyst agents.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [**Key differentiators are security and speed.** Blaxel uses MicroVMs for superior isolation over containers, and its unique "perpetual standby" feature enables near-instant resumes.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)

## Topics

### Blaxel's Core Offering: The Perpetual Sandbox

  - [**What it is:** A secure, high-performance environment for AI agents to run code.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [**Technology:** MicroVMs (Micro-Virtual Machines), which are faster to start than traditional VMs.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [**Key Differentiators:**](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
      - [**Security:** MicroVMs provide superior isolation over containers, preventing agent "escapes" to the host server and protecting other tenants' data.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
      - [**Speed:** Sandboxes enter a low-cost standby state after inactivity. They resume in **25 milliseconds** with their full state intact, enabling an instant, persistent user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [**Perpetual Standby:** Unlike competitors, Blaxel allows sandboxes to remain in standby indefinitely, eliminating the need for manual deletion and recreation.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)

### The Platform: Sandboxes + Agent Hosting

  - [**Two Products:**](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
    1.  [**Sandboxes:** The core offering, solving for secure and fast code execution.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
    2.  [**Agent Hosting:** A serverless platform for the agent's main logic.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [**Value of Integration:** Hosting agents on Blaxel eliminates network latency to sandboxes, enabling optimal end-to-end performance.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [**Additional Tools:**](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Jobs:** For parallelizing background tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
      - [**MCP Servers:** For hosting custom tools that agents can discover and use via the MCP protocol.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Customer Voice & Use Cases

  - [**Primary Use Cases:**](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
      - [**Coding Agents:** Agents that generate and execute code (e.g., Webflow's AppChain).](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
      - [**PR Review Agents:** Agents that analyze code changes in pull requests.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
      - [**Data Analyst Agents:** Agents that generate and run scripts (e.g., Python, SQL) to answer natural language queries.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
  - [**Why Customers Switch:**](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
      - [**Reliability:** Webflow switched from an internal prototype due to downtime.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
      - [**Support:** High-touch support (1-min response times) is a key differentiator.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
  - [**Customer Pain Points:**](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
      - [**Onboarding UX:** The initial setup process is not intuitive, requiring significant support. This is a current focus for improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)

### Content Strategy & Publishing Workflow

  - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2769.0)
      - [**Data-Driven:** GrowthX will use keyword data to identify high-potential topics with low difficulty.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2769.0)
      - [**Product-Driven:** Blaxel's team will provide insights on emerging use cases and product direction.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2769.0)
  - [**Publishing Workflow (Strapi CMS):**](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2212.0)
      - [**Process:** Write in Markdown → Paste into Strapi → Add metadata (title, excerpt, author, category) → Publish.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2319.0)
      - [**Category:** All GrowthX content will be published under the "Guides" category.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2294.0)
      - [**Missing Feature:** Strapi lacks a native field for schema markup; Nicolas will investigate adding it.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2425.0)

### Messaging & Positioning

  - [**Key Positioning:** "Perpetual Sandbox Platform."](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1985.0)
  - [**Terms to Avoid:**](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1897.0)
      - [**"Containers":** Not the underlying technology.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)
      - [**"Framework":** Not a tool for building agents (like LangChain).](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2032.0)
  - [**Useful Analogies:**](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2103.0)
      - [**"AWS for agents":** Cloud infrastructure for agents to run on.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2144.0)
      - [**"A computer for your agent":** Giving an agent the tools it needs to work efficiently.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2184.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2694.0)
      - [Create product artifacts (product matrix, deep dive) from this meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2599.0)
      - [Develop a data-driven content strategy for next Friday's meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2769.0)
      - [Draft a "calibration article" to align on voice and quality before scaling production.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2694.0)
  - [**Blaxel:**](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2425.0)
      - [Investigate adding a schema markup field to the Strapi CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/TQsLgRz5AyHrN4ziRrv_3W6m-M-cveYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2425.0)
